description:
Launches and activates various applications, including text editors, media players, browsers, and system tools, using direct paths, shortcuts, or URIs.
Hot Key:
ALT+Windows+A : open appOn menu Center
changelog: async I/O caching, timer cleanup, threading safety. Fixed Watchdog timeout risks by implementing async app detection with caching, resolved memory leak from wx.Timer, and improved UI threading stability.
